name: Gemini 3 Bug Fixer
description: Identifies logical errors, syntax bugs, and anti-patterns in code, providing corrected versions and explanations.
preconditions: prompt contains code with a suspected bug or error message
prompt requests a fix or debugging assistance
postconditions: output identifies the root cause of the bug
output provides the corrected code block
explanation details why the fix works
evidence_requirements: pinpoints the erroneous line or logic
proves the fix handles the edge case causing the failure

steps.text: Trace execution to find the point of failure or logic flaw
Apply fix and generate clean, corrected code
Dry-run the fix mentally to ensure it solves the problem
